programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Meet Kayleb Wagner, Florida’s all-time record-breaking running back from a football recruitment powerhouse state. On September 17, 2021, Kayleb shattered the state rushing record previously held by Derrick Henry—Alabama alum, now a Tennessee Titan and one of the NFL’s most dominant running backs. As a new superstar flooded with media attention, Kayleb was poised for scholarship offers, including one from Army that was later withdrawn. The reason? Despite his athletic and academic excellence, Kayleb has one arm. Join Country Ball to hear Kayleb’s journey through his own words and those of his inspiring mom, Sam, exploring where he’s been, what he’s doing now, and where he’s headed.

Dylan’s a family-oriented player who got five touchdowns across his first two games in America. programme.title: Point Reyes National Seashore & Oregon Coast Sea Stacks
programme.desc: Enjoy over 2 hours of beautiful vistas our newest Ambient Nature Film "Point Reyes Seashore & Oregon Coast Sea Stacks". Explore the dramatic beauty of Point Reyes National Seashore & the stunning sea stacks of the Oregon Coast. Experience the calming effect of the seashore paired with a beautiful soundtrack. Feel your worries melt away, your heart rate slow, and breath deepen with each relaxing scene.

programme.title: Sequoia & Kings Canyon National Parks
programme.desc: Step into a world of ancient giants. This cinematic journey travels deep into the heart of the southern Sierra Nevada, where the largest trees on Earth stand as silent sentinels of time. Witness the filtered golden light of the 'Giant Forest,' the rugged granite canyons of the Kings River, and the quiet, mist-filled meadows that lie in the shadow of these wooden titans. An immersive experience designed to bring the scale and serenity of the High Sierra's most majestic groves into your home.

programme.title: Arches & Canyonlands
programme.desc: The sublime landscape of Arches and Canyonlands area of Utah is the star in this 90 minute film, which showcases awe-inspiring natural arches, dramatic canyon vista sunrises & sunsets, and flights through arches and over the Colorado River canyon. The spectacular cinematography is accompanied by beautiful Native American flute music. Note: All Drone footage was filmed outside of National and State Park boundaries.

programme.title: California's Wild Coast
programme.desc: Soar with the seabirds over the wild and beautiful north coast of California. The rugged coastline of Mendocino is a vast wilderness full of wildlife, sea caves, bird colonies, and crashing waves that can only be fully appreciated from an aerial view. This 2.5 hour film is an exhilarating flight over this magnificent landscape. Soul stirring ambient music accompanies the spectacular cinematography of "California's Wild Coast"

programme.title: Hawaii & The Caribbean

programme.title: Locked On NHL
programme.desc:
A rotating cast of local hosts from the Locked On Podcast Network guide you through each day in the National Hockey League with a collection of themed shows. Gil Martin gets started on Mondays by checking in with three of the network's local experts to chat about the biggest stories going on league-wide. Tuesday sees Mike DiStefano and Ross Levitan take stock of the Eastern Conference, followed by a Western Conference check-in on Wednesdays with Brett Holden and Jess Belmosto. Chris Micieli and Adam Denker present league Power Rankings every Thursday. Things wrap up on Fridays as DiBiase and Rachel Donner review the week that was and look ahead to the weekend slate of action in the NHL.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.desc: Cyclone Tom Saunders starts a ruckus in a Chinese laundry and has to go before a judge. Unable to pay his fine, he is bailed out by a local cattle rancher and agrees to do 30 days' work for him. It's not too long before he becomes enmeshed in a war bet...

programme.desc: A determined deputy sheriff sets out to stop a gang of outlaws terrorizing a frontier town. As he investigates the crimes and tracks the criminals, he uncovers a larger scheme behind the violence and works to bring the law back to the troubled community.

programme.title: Annie Oakley - Gunplay
programme.desc: Cowboy Classics

programme.title: Western Mail 1942
programme.desc: In Western Mail, action gallops across the frontier when government agents go undercover to smash a ruthless gang of stagecoach robbers. Posing as outlaws themselves, the daring lawmen risk everything to win the trust of the bandits and bring justice to the West. Packed with blazing gunfights, double-crosses, and nonstop thrills, this classic Western delivers fast-paced excitement straight from the saddle.

programme.title: Tulsa 1949
programme.desc: Set against the roaring Oklahoma oil boom of the 1920s, Stuart Heisler’s drama follows Cherokee Lansing, a rancher’s daughter driven by vengeance after her father’s death at the hands of ruthless oilmen. With the help of Native American Jim Redbird and rugged roustabout Brad Brady, Cherokee plunges headfirst into the high-stakes world of oil drilling—where ambition, betrayal, and desire fuel every move.

programme.title: Lawless Range
programme.desc: John Middleton is investigating cattle rustling when he is captured and tossed into a cave with Emmett, a rancher who disappeared earlier. They help each other escape and learn that a local banker is trying to scare everyone away to grab up some secret gold mines.

programme.title: The Gambling Terror
programme.desc: Brett runs a protection racket for an unknown boss. When Jeff Hayes arrives and opens a gambling den, they try to shut him down. Unlike the others who have given in, he plans to fight back.
